notes: prod_signal_score is internal; without business KPI (task success / incident load) gate
column6: 80+ can still ship brittle flows. Add outcome-based promotion criterion.

notes: Mandatory MCP from day-1 can block teams with legacy/internal tools; phased adoption with exception inventory holds. Enforce "new integrations only" first.
95% recovery_success_rate is framework-local; end-to-end user task success and rollback blast-radius not in scope. Add business-outcome and blast-radius gates.
Optimal for "mid-scale default" is context-dependent; small static FAQ corpus may not need Qdrant+reranker. Label as default for balanced/growth profile only.
Always-on reranker adds latency/cost; high-confidence low-ambiguity queries may not benefit. Conditional reranking by uncertainty/confidence is required.
Stable for "mid-scale" assumes workload mix; incumbent PG/OpenSearch can make different default optimal. Add incumbent-infra and workload-mix caveats.
3% handoff failure alone can mislead if failures are low-impact or auto-recovered. Use severity-weighted handoff failure and business impact.
Blueprint holds for modular composition; adoption cost and team familiarity vary. Recommend as reference pattern
Sample counts (120/80) are not calibrated to domain; verticals need domain-stratified sets. Add stratification and domain-size guidance.
100M chunks + P95 misses per-tenant hotspot and queue-depth; noisy tenants can breach SLO before global threshold. Add per-tenant and queue-depth triggers.
License is critical but operational readiness (owners
column7: incident freeze) can dominate early incidents. Rebalance risk: legal + operational + observability.

notes: High document velocity or real-time ingestion needs may require streaming (Kafka) before "P2"; P2-only framing can block scale-up. Add velocity-based exception path.
